positive: Minimalist illustration of a majestic cosmic wave cresting over a glowing, stylized mountain range. The style should be sophisticated graphic design, inspired by Art Nouveau curves mixed with modern celestial geometry. The main subject is the wave, rendered with flowing, iridescent lines of deep indigo, sapphire blue, and hints of ethereal gold. Negative space must be used effectively for clean silhouette printing. The background should feature a stylized gradient sky filled with nebulous constellations (geometric dot work and faint lines). Composition must be centrally focused, high contrast, and highly scalable for t-shirt printing. Studio lighting, vector art look, extremely clean lines, 4K resolution.
negative: blur, low resolution, text, watermark, signature, messy, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noisy, photorealistic, grain, muddy colors
